summary: REQ-1 appears implemented in StoryNarrationControl by replacing empty SelectItem values with a non-empty sentinel and mapping that sentinel to default-voice behavior. REQ-3 is partially implemented by updating Aaron’s character entry to reference a new v2 artwork filename and updating alt text in English, but the actual image asset change is not evidenced in the diff. Additionally, CharactersGallery adds an onError fallback that swaps any broken character image to Aaron’s image, which was not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the character Aaron artwork asset to depict dark skin and short/visible hair (character-aaron.dim_768x768.png -> character-aaron-v2.dim_768x768.png) and keep the gallery wired to the updated asset.
missing_requirements.reason: The code now references the updated filename, but the diff summary does not show any actual image asset being added/updated, so the visual change itself is not evidenced.

hallucinated_features.description: CharactersGallery image onError handler that falls back to Aaron’s image for any character whose image fails to load.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not ask for cross-character image fallback behavior; it only required preserving the gallery and updating Aaron’s artwork.

hallucinated_features.description: Project tracking/state updates in project_state.json (new_feature_requests entries/status).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not request maintaining or modifying a project_state.json file; this appears to be meta/project bookkeeping not specified as part of the fix.
